name: armaraos-agent-health-monitor
description: Every 15 minutes: polls /api/health and /api/agents. On success: not appended to Chat; failures still surface (see docs/scheduled-ainl.md).

name: armaraos-daily-budget-digest
description: Daily 08:00: fetches /api/budget summary. On success: not appended to Chat; failures still surface (see docs/scheduled-ainl.md).

name: armaraos-budget-threshold-alert
description: Hourly: compares spend to 80% of budget limit. On success: not appended to Chat; failures still surface (see docs/scheduled-ainl.md).

name: armaraos-new-version-checker
description: Weekly: GitHub + PyPI version check vs local /api/version; JSON appended to the target agent session.

name: armaraos-channel-session-digest
description: Every 6 hours: digest of daemon status, agent count, channel catalog, and workflows; JSON appended to the target agent session.

name: armaraos-system-health-monitor
description: Every 2 hours at :15 (opt-in): local health, agents, version + GitHub/PyPI upstream. On success: not appended to Chat; failures still surface (see docs/scheduled-ainl.md).

name: armaraos-weekly-usage-report
description: Sunday evening: LLM summary of the week's usage (requires LLM adapter); output appended to the target agent session.

name: armaraos-ainl-health-weekly
description: Minimal AINL runtime smoke test (core.ADD 1 0). On success: not appended to Chat; failures still surface (see docs/scheduled-ainl.md).

frame.episode: Scheduled validation run for learning frame handling.
Stub graph run; host still owns full SKILL Meta for interactive flows.

name: armaraos-lead-gen-pipeline
description: Monday 07:00 (opt-in): deterministic lead fetch + heuristic score; optional LLM note when extra.use_llm is yes. Output JSON is appended to the target agent session.

frame.episode: Curated cron: GitHub public user profile + optional llm.COMPLETION when extra.use_llm is yes.

name: armaraos-research-pipeline
description: Tuesday 06:30 (opt-in): GitHub repo search for extra.research_query + optional LLM brief. Output JSON is appended to the target agent session.

frame.intent: Embedded research showcase (GitHub search + optional LLM)
frame.episode: Curated cron: api.github.com search; set extra.research_query to a URL-safe token (no spaces).
